summary: Iteration 16 - TTS Streaming with Fish Audio s1 Backend: All 11 backend tests PASSED. Frontend chat and TTS playback verified. TTS endpoint returns audio/mpeg with X-Voice-Config header confirming backend=s1, latency=balanced. TTFB < 1s verified. Chat responses have NO emotion markers visible to users.

integration_issues.issue: Console error 'Failed to execute postMessage on Window: Request object could not be cloned' when MSE fallback triggers. Audio still plays via blob fallback.

critical_code_review_comments: TTS endpoint correctly uses Fish Audio s1 backend with latency=balanced for low TTFB streaming
strip_emotion_markers() in chat.py continues to work - AI responses have no (calm), (soft tone) markers
useAudioStream.js implements MediaSource Extensions for true streaming with blob fallback for Safari
Minor: playViaBlob fallback receives consumed response object when MSE fails - causes non-critical console error

mocked_apis.fish_audio_tts: LIVE - Returns audio with s1 backend (verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified TTS streaming improvements: (1) Fish Audio s1 backend with latency=balanced confirmed via X-Voice-Config header; (2) TTFB < 1s verified; (3) Audio size >10KB for sentences; (4) Chat responses have NO emotion markers (strip_emotion_markers working); (5) Frontend MediaSource streaming works in Chromium with blob fallback; (6) All auth endpoints working (guest, admin login); (7) Static endpoints (/api/problems, /api/tariffs, /api/specialists) working.

features_tested.6_chat_no_emotion_markers: PASS - AI responses have no (calm), (soft tone) markers
features_tested.9_chat_with_token: PASS - Chat with guest token works
features_tested.11_frontend_chat: PASS - Chat page loads, message sent, AI response received
features_tested.12_frontend_tts: PASS - TTS button clicked, audio element created with blob URL

verified_files.tts.py: Uses backend=FISH_BACKEND, latency=FISH_LATENCY, X-Voice-Config header added
verified_files.useAudioStream.js: MediaSource streaming with blob fallback implemented
